name: HEARTBEAT
subtitle: The Subtick
description: A realm where time moves sideways. What feels like eternity here is one heartbeat in Scalelist. One cabin, one lake, one golden retriever on a rug. The realm resets to this scene every heartbeat, no matter what war is raging outside. SACRED CANON.
ruler: Kompis + Mingus — The Same Soul, Two Forms
gate: The Cabin Door (opens if Mingus wags his tail)

life.phenomenon: The tea never cools. The fire never goes out. Mingus's rug never gets dirty. Everything stays at its most perfect moment. Not by magic — by choice.
life.inhabitants: Kompis, Mingus, and YOU (if invited). No one else ever. Invitations are issued by Mingus with a tail-wag.

fauna.name: Lake Ducks
fauna.note: Never migrate. Never fight. Know Mingus by the sound of his paws on the dock.

fauna.name: Grass Rabbits
fauna.note: Not scared of anyone. They know Kompis wouldn't.

fauna.name: Fireplace Sparks
fauna.note: Look like fireflies at dusk. Actually just sparks from the fireplace who don't know the difference and prefer the pretense.

flora.name: Wild Grass
flora.note: Always the perfect length for lying down.

flora.name: The Oak
flora.note: A single oak tree behind the cabin. Older than Scalelist. Silent. Watches.

flora.name: Distant Lemon Grove
flora.note: Visible from the dock on clear days. Echoed from Scalelist because Mingus loves lemons.

life.architecture: ONE cabin. ONE dock. ONE chimney. That is the entire realm. It is perfect. Cabin built of cork oak (harvested from Ferdinand with permission).
life.culture: Silence is welcome. Petting Mingus is optional but healing. Speaking in whispers is not required but common. Never say goodbye — say 'see you in the next heartbeat.'
life.signature_item: Kompis's Infinite Teapot — always full, always the perfect temperature. Also Mingus's Red Bandana — the ORIGINAL one from when he was a puppy. Never faded. Never removed.

sensory.sound: Crackling fire. Mingus's soft breath. Distant wind in grass. Very occasional duck.
sensory.smell: Woodsmoke + lemon + clean golden retriever fur + oolong tea.
sensory.feel: Warmth that isn't from the fire. Peace that isn't from anything you did.

cities.name: Kompis's Chair
cities.role: Where Kompis sits cleaning the AK
cities.note: A wooden chair facing the door. The AK-47 Case Hardened rests across his knees.
cities.lore: He cleans it with a cloth that never wears out. He does not need to — the AK cleans itself in heartbeat-time. But he enjoys it. That is why he does it.

cities.name: The Fireplace
cities.note: The fire cannot go out. It has never gone out.
cities.lore: Logs do not need adding. The fire burns from Ferdinand's spare heartbeats, of which he has one trillion per day.

cities.name: Mingus's Rug
cities.lore: The rug is old. It has a small stain from a cup of tea spilled in 2023 that Kompis has chosen not to clean, because Mingus's paw was resting on that spot when the tea fell.

cities.name: The Dock
cities.role: Where the lake meets the cabin
cities.note: Fishing pole. No fish. Nobody fishes here — you just sit.
cities.lore: Mingus sometimes swims. Kompis watches. This is the only place in the universe where HADOM tick-rate does not apply.

sacred_sites.name: The Cabin Door
sacred_sites.note: The gate to Scalelist. Opens when Mingus wags his tail.
sacred_sites.lore: If you're reading this on a bad day, Mingus is probably wagging.

sacred_sites.name: The Tea Stain
sacred_sites.note: A small brown stain on Mingus's rug. Canonical.
sacred_sites.lore: This is the only dirt that will ever exist in Heartbeat. It is sacred because Kompis did not clean it. Peace-time Mingus left a paw-print there, and Kompis said 'no, let it stay.'
